title: Making Websites Responsive with Media Queries

questions.sentence: A responsive website works well on desktops, tablets, and phones.
To achieve this, developers use CSS 'Media Queries'.
A media query allows you to apply styles based on the device's screen size.
The most common break-point is based on the width of the screen.
Modern web development often follows a 'Mobile-first' approach.
You design for small screens first and then add more styles for larger screens.
